import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { ShoppingBag, ShoppingCart, LogOut, User, MapPin, Package, Clock, Plus, Trash2, ArrowRight, Shield, Mail, Phone, Calendar } from 'lucide-react'; const ProfilePage = ({ user, cart, orders, profileData, setProfileData, setCurrentPage, handleLogout, setError, loadOrders, loading, setLoading }) => { const [editMode, setEditMode] = useState(false); return (
{/* 1. ULTRA-MINIMAL NAV */}
SHOP.AI
{/* 2. BOLD HERO SECTION */}
Member Account

Hello, {profileData.fullName?.split(' ')[0] || 'User'}

{/* 3. CORE DETAILS (LEFT) */}
{/* PERSONAL SECTION */}

Account Identity

Gender

{/* ADDRESS SECTION */}

Shipping Network

{profileData.addresses?.map((addr, i) => (

{addr.label || 'Primary'}

{addr.AddressLine1}, {addr.City}

))}
{/* 4. ACTIVITY & STATS (RIGHT) */}

Shopping Stats

Activity

{/* Background abstract shape */}

Recent Orders

{orders.slice(0, 3).map((o, idx) => (

#{o.id.toString().slice(-4)}

{new Date(o.orderDate).toLocaleDateString()}

₹{o.totalAmount}

))}
); }; /* Sub-components for cleaner structure */ const DetailItem = ({ label, value, icon: Icon, edit }) => (

{label}

); const StatRow = ({ label, val }) => (
{label} {val}
); export default ProfilePage;
